Debris Decision
==============

Canonical site: https://debrisdecision.com
Primary product: Homeowner-first dumpster vs junk removal decision engine

Core entry points
- /dumpster/size-weight-calculator
- /dumpster/dumpster-vs-junk-removal-which-is-cheaper
- /dumpster/heavy-debris-rules
- /dumpster/material-guides
- /dumpster/project-guides

Trust and methodology
- /about/methodology
- /about/editorial-policy
- /about/contact

Data and limits
- Outputs are planning estimates, not binding vendor contracts.
- Included tons and max-haul limits are modeled separately.
- Heavy debris recommendations prioritize feasibility and safety first.
